subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned and attained unto God, the Lord of the worlds, that he may hearken unto the call of his Lord when raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل و فاز بالله رب العالمین لیسمع ندآء ربه اذ ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
